Description: Verify products load from Sanity CMS
Steps: 1. Navigate to /onsale 2. Wait for products to load
Expected Result: Products displayed in grid with images and prices
Actual Result: Products displayed correctly with images and prices from Sanity

Steps: 1. Click on any product card 2. Wait for detail page
Expected Result: Product name price image description displayed
Actual Result: All product details rendered correctly from Sanity

Description: Verify item is added to cart
Steps: 1. Open product detail 2. Select size and color 3. Click Add to Cart
Expected Result: Toast notification shown and item appears in cart
Actual Result: Toast shows success message and cart count updates in header

Steps: 1. Go to cart page 2. Click delete icon on item
Expected Result: Item removed from cart and total updates
Actual Result: Item removed successfully and totals recalculated

Steps: 1. Go to cart page 2. Click + or - buttons
Actual Result: Quantity updates and price recalculates correctly

Description: Verify valid promo code applies discount
Steps: 1. Go to cart 2. Enter SAVE10 3. Click Apply
Actual Result: Discount applied and green confirmation shown

Description: Verify invalid promo code shows error
Steps: 1. Go to cart 2. Enter WRONG123 3. Click Apply
Actual Result: Toast error message displayed correctly

Steps: 1. Fill shipping form 2. Select Card 3. Click Pay with Stripe
Actual Result: Redirects to Stripe hosted checkout page

Description: Verify Cash on Delivery order placement
Steps: 1. Fill shipping form 2. Select COD 3. Click Place Order
Expected Result: Order created and redirected to success page
Actual Result: Order saved in Sanity and success page shown with order ID

Steps: 1. Go to /checkout with empty cart
Expected Result: Empty cart message with Continue Shopping button
Actual Result: Shows empty cart state with redirect button

Steps: 1. Go to /track-order 2. Enter valid order ID 3. Click Track
Expected Result: Order status stepper and details shown
Actual Result: Visual stepper shows correct order status and details

Steps: 1. Go to /orders 2. Enter email 3. Click Search
Expected Result: List of orders for that email displayed
Actual Result: Orders displayed with status badges and track links

Description: Verify admin can see all orders
Steps: 1. Navigate to /admin
Expected Result: Dashboard with stats cards and orders table
Actual Result: Stats cards show totals and table lists all orders

Description: Verify admin can update order status
Steps: 1. Go to /admin 2. Change status dropdown on an order
Actual Result: Status updates immediately in UI and persists in Sanity

Steps: 1. Go to /onsale 2. Select T-Shirts category
Actual Result: Products filtered correctly by category
Notes: Dynamic GROQ query with category filter

Steps: 1. Go to /onsale 2. Adjust price slider to $50-$150
Expected Result: Only products in price range shown
Actual Result: Products filtered by price range correctly

Steps: 1. Go to /onsale 2. Click Medium size button
Expected Result: Only products with Medium size shown
Actual Result: Products filtered by selected size

Steps: 1. Go to /onsale 2. Click a color circle
Expected Result: Only products with that color shown
Actual Result: Products filtered by selected color

Steps: 1. Go to /onsale 2. Click page 2 button
Actual Result: Page changes and shows correct product set

Steps: 1. Open product detail 2. Click heart icon
Expected Result: Heart fills red and toast notification shown
Actual Result: Item added to wishlist with toast confirmation

Steps: 1. Go to /wishlist 2. Click filled heart on item
Actual Result: Item removed and grid updates

Steps: 1. Add items to wishlist 2. Refresh browser
Actual Result: Items persist via localStorage

Description: Verify adding wishlist item to cart
Steps: 1. Go to /wishlist 2. Click Add to Cart on item
Expected Result: Item added to cart with toast
Actual Result: Item added to cart successfully

Description: Verify review submission on product page
Steps: 1. Open product detail 2. Click Write a Review 3. Fill form 4. Submit
Actual Result: Review saved to Sanity and appears in reviews list

Description: Verify reviews load on product page
Steps: 1. Open product detail with reviews
Expected Result: Reviews displayed with ratings and dates
Actual Result: Real reviews fetched from Sanity and displayed

Description: Verify related products show same category
Steps: 1. Open a T-Shirt product detail
Expected Result: You might also like section shows other T-Shirts
Actual Result: Related products from same category displayed

Steps: 1. Click Sign In button 2. Enter credentials
Expected Result: User signed in and profile icon shown
Actual Result: Clerk modal opens and authentication works

Steps: 1. Sign out 2. Navigate to /checkout
Actual Result: Clerk middleware protects checkout/orders/track-order

Description: Verify search input exists in header
Steps: 1. Check header on desktop
Actual Result: Search bar renders correctly

Steps: 1. Click different products
Expected Result: Each product loads its own detail page
Actual Result: Dynamic route /products/[id] works for all products

Description: Verify cart icon shows item count
Steps: 1. Add items to cart 2. Check header
Expected Result: Red badge shows number of cart items

Steps: 1. Add items to wishlist 2. Check header

Steps: 1. Add to cart 2. Add to wishlist 3. Apply invalid promo

Expected Result: Images below viewport load on scroll
Actual Result: Next/Image handles lazy loading automatically

Steps: 1. Add/remove cart and wishlist items

Description: Verify API keys not exposed in frontend
Steps: 1. Check browser source code 2. Search for sk_ or secret
Expected Result: No secret keys in client-side code
Actual Result: All secret keys stored in .env.local server-side only

Steps: 1. Try submitting with empty fields
Actual Result: Form validation blocks empty submissions

Steps: 1. Try submitting empty review
Actual Result: Client and server-side validation active

Steps: 1. Check network tab for API calls
Expected Result: All API calls over HTTPS in production
Actual Result: Vercel enforces HTTPS on all routes

Steps: 1. Check webhook handler code
Actual Result: constructEvent validates webhook signature

Steps: 1. Check writeClient usage
Expected Result: Write token only used in API routes
Actual Result: writeClient.ts only imported in server-side API routes

Actual Result: Clerk middleware protects sensitive routes
